about.title: About
about.description: Founder and software engineer building cloud infrastructure, hosting systems, and web platforms.

items.title: Founder & CEO, Nubis

items.title: Web Developer & Head of Operations, EBIHOST

items.description: Led strategy and operations, built web applications, managed client relationships, and designed data pipeline architecture with a small product team.
